enrichment.short_description: Local Falcon tracks Google Maps rankings and AI visibility across ChatGPT, Gemini and AI Overviews using geo-grid scans.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Local Falcon: geo-grid rank tracking for Google Maps plus AI visibility monitoring across ChatGPT, Gemini and AI Overviews.

features.title: Local Rank Tracking
features.description: Geo-grid scans measure Google Business Profile and Apple Maps rankings on a grid from 3x3 up to 21x21 points.

features.title: AI Visibility Tracking
features.description: Monitors how a brand appears in answers from ChatGPT, Google AI Overviews, Gemini, Grok, and AI Mode.

features.title: Falcon AI
features.description: Generates AI-written performance insights and optimization recommendations from scan data, at 25 credits per report.

features.title: Falcon Agent
features.description: Automates Google Business Profile tasks including review responses and post scheduling; included on the Premium plan.

features.title: Falcon Guard
features.description: Monitors critical Google Business Profile fields to flag unauthorized changes.

features.title: Reviews Analysis
features.description: AI-powered sentiment analysis of customer reviews.

features.title: Local Keyword Research
features.description: Identifies keywords relevant to both traditional local search and AI-driven search.

features.title: Campaign Reports
features.description: Schedules recurring visibility tracking across multiple business locations with CSV/PDF export.

pros: Combines Google Maps geo-grid rank tracking with AI visibility tracking across ChatGPT, Gemini, and Google AI Overviews.
New accounts get 100 free credits with no credit card required.
Integrates with Zapier, n8n, Slack, and Looker Studio, plus an API and MCP server on Basic plans and above.
Grid size is adjustable from 3x3 to 21x21 points for granular visibility.
White-label reporting is available on the Premium plan for agencies.
cons: Credit-based pricing can make costs harder to predict than flat-rate plans.
Falcon AI analysis and API access consume additional credits or require higher-tier plans.
Overage credits cost $0.05 each once a plan's monthly allotment is used.
Enterprise pricing isn't published and starts around $499/month.

faqs.question: Does Local Falcon offer a free trial?
faqs.answer: New accounts receive 100 free credits with no credit card required, which can be used to test scans before subscribing.

faqs.question: What plans does Local Falcon offer?
faqs.answer: Four standard tiers: Starter ($24.99/month), Basic ($49.99/month), Pro ($99.99/month), and Premium ($199.99/month), plus custom Enterprise packages starting around $499/month.

faqs.question: Can Local Falcon track AI search visibility, not just Google Maps?
faqs.answer: Yes, its AI Visibility Tracking feature monitors how a business appears in ChatGPT, Google AI Overviews, Gemini, Grok, and AI Mode.

faqs.question: Does Local Falcon integrate with other tools?
faqs.answer: Basic plans and above include API access, an MCP server, a Looker Studio connector, and Zapier/n8n integrations.

faqs.question: What happens when I run out of credits?
faqs.answer: Additional usage is billed at $0.05 per credit as a pay-as-you-go overage.

use_cases.title: Multi-location rank tracking
use_cases.description: Track Google Maps and Apple Maps rankings across many locations using geo-grid scans.

use_cases.title: AI search visibility monitoring
use_cases.description: Monitor how a brand is represented in ChatGPT, Gemini, and Google AI Overviews responses.

use_cases.title: White-label client reporting
use_cases.description: Generate white-label rank and visibility reports for clients on the Premium plan.

use_cases.title: Automated GBP management
use_cases.description: Use Falcon Agent to automate review responses and post scheduling for Google Business Profiles.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Local Falcon?
paragraphs: Local Falcon is an agentic AI search and local SEO platform that tracks how a business ranks on Google Maps and Apple Maps, and how it is represented by AI answer engines like ChatGPT, Gemini, and Google AI Overviews.

The platform runs geo-grid scans - arrays of simulated searches from a grid of points around a location - to visualize where a business ranks across a geographic area, alongside Falcon AI, which turns scan data into written optimization recommendations.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Local Falcon is for
paragraphs: Local Falcon is built for local SEO agencies, multi-location brands, and local business owners who need to track Google Maps rankings and how they show up in AI-generated search answers.

enrichment.short_description: Places Scout is a local SEO platform for rank tracking, GBP monitoring, reputation, and citation analysis with 400+ data points.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Places Scout: local SEO software for rank tracking, Google Business Profile monitoring, reputation, and citation analysis.

features.title: Search Performance
features.description: Tracks keyword rankings against named competitors.

features.title: Geo-Matrix
features.description: Visualizes local rankings geographically across a map grid.

features.title: GBP Radar
features.description: Monitors Google Business Profile changes and status.

features.title: Reputation Monitoring
features.description: Tracks reviews across more than 30 review sites.

features.title: Citation Intel
features.description: Discovers business mentions and citations across the internet.

features.title: Listing Audit
features.description: Checks NAP (name, address, phone) consistency across listings.

pros: Modular pricing lets clients pay only for the tools they use.
Analyzes over 400 data points per business.
Geo-Matrix provides a geographic view of ranking performance across a location grid.
Covers reputation monitoring across 30+ review sites in addition to rank tracking.
cons: No pricing is published; buyers must request a demo or custom quote.
No free trial is advertised on the site.
Public information about integrations, supported platforms, and company details is limited.

faqs.question: How is Places Scout priced?
faqs.answer: It uses custom, modular packages so clients "pay for only the tools you use"; pricing isn't published and requires contacting the company.

faqs.question: Does Places Scout offer a free trial?
faqs.answer: No free trial is advertised; prospective customers are directed to request a demo.

faqs.question: What does Geo-Matrix do?
faqs.answer: Geo-Matrix visualizes local search rankings across a geographic grid so users can see performance by location.

faqs.question: Can Places Scout monitor online reviews?
faqs.answer: Yes, its Reputation Monitoring feature tracks reviews across more than 30 review sites.

use_cases.title: Local rank tracking against competitors
use_cases.description: Track keyword rankings against named competitors using the Search Performance tool.

use_cases.title: Multi-location reputation monitoring
use_cases.description: Monitor reviews across 30+ sites for businesses with multiple locations.

use_cases.title: Listing consistency audits
use_cases.description: Audit NAP consistency across business listings using the Listing Audit tool.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Places Scout?
paragraphs: Places Scout is a local SEO platform that provides automated analysis across more than 400 data points for a business, covering rank tracking, Google Business Profile monitoring, reputation tracking, and citation discovery.

Rather than a single fixed subscription, Places Scout uses a modular pricing approach so clients can pay only for the specific tools - such as Search Performance, Geo-Matrix, or Reputation Monitoring - that they need.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Places Scout is for
paragraphs: Places Scout targets marketing agencies and enterprise brands with multiple locations that need rank tracking, listing audits, and reputation monitoring in one platform.

enrichment.short_description: GeoRanker offers SERP, rank-tracking, and keyword data APIs for local search across Google, Bing, Baidu, YouTube, Yahoo, and Naver.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: GeoRanker: SERP API and local rank tracking with keyword data across Google, Bing, Baidu, YouTube, Yahoo, and Naver.

features.title: Rank Tracker API
features.description: Tracks local keyword rankings programmatically via API.

features.title: SERP API
features.description: Delivers unlimited paid and organic SERP data across Google, Bing, Baidu, YouTube, Yahoo, and Naver.

features.title: Keywords API
features.description: Provides search volume and competition data for keywords.

features.title: Merchant API
features.description: Retrieves shopping and product result data.

features.title: Competitive Intelligence
features.description: Tools for analyzing competitor search performance.

features.title: Keyword Research & Density Analysis
features.description: Analyzes keyword competition and on-page density.

features.title: Voice Search Data Extraction
features.description: Extracts data related to voice search queries.

features.title: Google Ads Audit
features.description: Audits Google Ads campaigns for performance issues.

pros: Supports SERP data across six search engines: Google, Bing, Baidu, YouTube, Yahoo, and Naver.
API-first design suited to developers who need custom scraping or crawling at scale.
Tiered plans scale from Professionals to Enterprise with more campaigns, keywords, and crawls.
7-day free trial available before any charge is made.
cons: The free trial requires a credit card up front.
Agencies and Enterprise plans cost $249-$490/month, which may exceed small-business budgets.
Founding year, headquarters, and company size aren't disclosed on the site.
AI capabilities aren't explicitly described.

faqs.question: Does GeoRanker offer a free trial?
faqs.answer: Yes, a 7-day free trial is available; a credit card is required but no charge occurs until the trial ends, with a two-day reminder before billing.

faqs.question: What search engines does GeoRanker cover?
faqs.answer: Its SERP API covers Google, Bing, Baidu, YouTube, Yahoo, and Naver.

faqs.question: What are GeoRanker's pricing tiers?
faqs.answer: Professionals ($99/month), Agencies ($249/month), and Enterprises ($490/month), each with increasing campaign, keyword, and crawl limits.

faqs.question: Does GeoRanker integrate with other tools?
faqs.answer: Google Sheets integration is available on the Agencies and Enterprise plans.

use_cases.title: Local rank tracking via API
use_cases.description: Pull local keyword ranking data programmatically using the Rank Tracker API.

use_cases.title: Large-scale SERP data collection
use_cases.description: Retrieve unlimited paid and organic SERP data across six search engines.
use_cases.audience: SEO tool builders and data teams

use_cases.title: Competitive keyword research
use_cases.description: Analyze keyword competition and search volume with the Keywords API.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is GeoRanker?
paragraphs: GeoRanker is an SEO data platform that provides unlimited paid and organic SERP data via an API, along with custom scraping and crawling services and local rank-tracking tools.
Its API suite covers rank tracking, keyword data, and merchant/shopping results across six search engines, including Google, Bing, Baidu, YouTube, Yahoo, and Naver.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who GeoRanker is for
paragraphs: GeoRanker serves SEO agencies, developers, and enterprises that need large-scale search data extraction and local rank tracking through an API rather than only a dashboard.

enrichment.short_description: Localo automates Google Business Profile tracking, reviews, citations, and content for local SEO agencies and businesses.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Localo: automate Google Business Profile tracking, reviews, citations, and content, with a 14-day free trial.

Covers GBP tracking, reviews, citations, content, and website generation in one platform.
Supports six languages, including Polish, English, German, French, Spanish, and Brazilian Portuguese.
Pro plan includes a dedicated account manager and local SEO training.
30-day money-back guarantee on paid plans.
cons: Advanced features like the AI Agent, Smart Tasks, and competitor tracking are limited to the Pro plan and above.

faqs.answer: Yes, a 14-day free trial with no credit card required.

faqs.question: What does the Single Business plan cost?
faqs.answer: $39/month when billed annually.

faqs.question: What's included in the Pro plan?
faqs.answer: Up to 60 active profiles, 30 optimization seats, AI Agent, Smart Tasks, competitor tracking, citations manager, audit, and team/client access, at $149/month billed annually.

faqs.question: Where is Localo based?

faqs.question: What languages does Localo support?
faqs.answer: Polish, English, German, French, Spanish, and Brazilian Portuguese.

features: Tracking, reviews, content publisher, website builder, schema generator, protection, reports

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Localo?
paragraphs: Localo is a local SEO platform that automates Google Business Profile optimization, ranking tracking, review management, and citation building for local search visibility.

The platform also includes a website builder that generates local business websites from Google Business Profile data, and an AI Agent that answers questions about performance and market trends on the Pro plan.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Localo is for
paragraphs: Localo is aimed at local SEO agencies, freelance SEO specialists, and local business owners who want to automate day-to-day Google Business Profile management.

Annual billing gives 2 months free versus monthly pricing.

faqs.answer: Yes, the Starter plan is free and includes 250 scan credits and 2 profiles.

faqs.question: What does the Growth plan cost?
faqs.answer: $24/month billed annually ($29/month if paid monthly), or $290/year.

faqs.question: How often are rankings tracked?
faqs.answer: Local map rankings are monitored every 3 days.

faqs.question: Does Grid My Business integrate with AI tools?
faqs.answer: Yes, it offers an MCP server integration to connect tools like Claude Desktop, Claude Code, Codex, and Cursor.

use_cases.title: Free local rank tracking

use_cases.audience: Small businesses testing local SEO tools

use_cases.title: Multi-location scaling

use_cases.title: Automated review and post management
use_cases.description: Use AI Agents to auto-respond to reviews and generate Google posts.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Grid My Business?
paragraphs: Grid My Business is an AI-powered local SEO platform that tracks local map rankings using geo-grid scans and helps optimize Google Business Profiles.
It includes AI Agents that automate review responses, post creation, and ranking optimization, plus an MCP server integration for connecting tools like Claude Desktop and Cursor to live ranking data.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Grid My Business is for
paragraphs: Grid My Business targets local SEO agencies, consultants, and small to enterprise multi-location businesses that want to track Google Maps rankings and automate GBP upkeep, starting from a free tier.

Agencies get 50% discounts on the citation and reviews add-ons.
Offers a free Chrome extension (ProfilePro) and audit tools before purchase.
Headquartered in Santa Monica, California, with public contact details.
cons: The core Paige plan starts at $99/month per business, plus separate paid add-ons for citations ($40/month) and reviews ($50/month).
No ongoing free plan; only a low-cost trial is offered to new users.
Company size and founding year aren't disclosed.

faqs.question: How much does Merchynt cost?
faqs.answer: The Paige plan starts at $99/month per business, with citation software ($40/month) and reviews software ($50/month) available as add-ons.

faqs.question: Does Merchynt offer a free trial?
faqs.answer: It offers a low-cost trial for new users rather than a free trial.

faqs.question: Where is Merchynt based?

faqs.question: Are there discounts for agencies?
faqs.answer: Yes, agencies get 50% off the citation ($20) and reviews ($25) add-ons.

use_cases.title: Automated GBP optimization

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Merchynt?
paragraphs: Merchynt is an AI-powered local SEO platform built around Paige, an AI assistant that analyzes competitor Google Business Profiles and automatically applies optimization changes.
Beyond core GBP optimization, it offers add-on modules for citation management and review management, plus a free Chrome extension called ProfilePro for auditing a business profile.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Merchynt is for
paragraphs: Merchynt is built for small to medium-sized businesses, marketing agencies managing multiple client locations, and franchise operations that want automated, ongoing GBP optimization.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Rio SEO?
paragraphs: Rio SEO offers the Local Experience (LX) platform, a suite of local marketing and customer experience tools covering listings management, local landing pages, review management, and Voice of Customer feedback.
The platform integrates with major search engines, maps applications, and directories including Google, Apple, Bing, Yelp, Facebook, and Nextdoor, and includes an AI component called Forsta AI.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Rio SEO is for

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Owner.com?
paragraphs: Owner.com is an AI-powered platform that helps independent restaurants grow online sales through an optimized website, branded mobile app, online ordering, and direct delivery without third-party commissions.
It also includes email and SMS marketing automation, kitchen tablet and POS integrations, and a reporting dashboard, aiming to help restaurants compete with national chains.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Owner.com is for
paragraphs: Owner.com is built for independent restaurant owners who want to reduce reliance on third-party delivery apps and their high commission fees.
